document_purpose: Broken-deps fixture for task-view 20.16 manual smoke-test: one Task with missing ledger-level dependency id + broken cross-doc link path. Used to verify PRODUCT inv 11 (broken cross-doc link missing-target marker) + inv 12 (broken Task.dependencies missing-target marker + page-top warning).

tasks.title: Task with broken dependency + broken cross-doc link
tasks.description: This Task references a non-existent dependency Task id `999` and carries a cross-doc link to a path that does not exist (`missing-document.md#section`). The mirror generator must still write the mirror; the viewer must render the dependency + link with the visually distinct missing-target marker per PRODUCT inv 11 + inv 12.
